title: Work and Health Programme statistics to August 2025
body: "The Work and Health Programme (WHP) predominantly helps disabled people, as well as the long-term unemployed and certain other priority groups (known as early access groups) to enter into and stay in work.  The WHP statistics cover 6 different measures:   Referrals Individuals referred Starts First earnings from employment Job outcomes Performance expectations   Further information  Read the background information and methodology note for more information about the WHP programme and statistics.  "
